zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Fiske於1525年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特多爾斯特時，她的父親Richard Fiske32歲，母親Elizabeth Joan Gould22歲。她於1547年與Thomas Eames在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1587年6月6日在她的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特福丁頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Fiske于1525年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特多爾斯特时，她的父亲Richard Fiske32岁，母亲Elizabeth Joan Gould22岁。她于1547年与Thomas Eames在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1587年6月6日在她的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特福丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Fiske was born in 1525, in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Fiske, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Joan Gould, was 22. She married Thomas Eames in 1547, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 6 June 1587, in her hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Fordington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Fiske est née en 1525, à Dorchester, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Fiske, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Joan Gould, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Eames en 1547, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 juin 1587, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Fordington, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Fiske 1525 in Dorchester, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Fiske 32 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Joan Gould 22. Sie hat 1547 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom Thomas Eames geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 6. Juni 1587 im Alter von 62 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Fordington, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fiske è nata il nel 1525 nel Dorchester, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Fiske, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Joan Gould, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Eames nel 1547, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 6 giugno 1587, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Fordington, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Fiskeが1525年にイギリスイギリスドールセトドールチェスターで生まれた時，父Richard Fiskeは32歳，母Elizabeth Joan Gouldは22歳であった。1547年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでThomas Eamesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1587年6月6日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトフォーディントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Fiske(이)가 1525년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 도르체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Fiske(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Joan Gould(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1547년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Thomas Eames(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 6월 6일 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 포딩턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Fiske nasceu em 1525, em Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Fiske, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Joan Gould, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Eames em 1547, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 6 de junho de 1587, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Fiske родилась в 1525 г. в местности дорчестир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Fiske было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Joan Gould, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Eames в 1547 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 6 июня 1587 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности фордингтон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Fiske nació en 1525, en Dorchester, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Fiske, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Joan Gould, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas Eames en 1547, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 6 de junio de 1587, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Fordington, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
